summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive signal was present in the hydrated artifact, and the job disables merge, fix PR, post-merge closeout, instant close, and low-signal closeout. Each PR should remain open for ordinary maintainer review rather than being closed or merged by Clownfish.

actions.reason: Independent open PR in this inventory shard; keep open for maintainer/author follow-up rather than close, merge, or fix.
Independent broad provider PR needing normal maintainer and author review; no safe close action is supported by the hydrated evidence.
